title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Preserve !prof data when folding frexp of select.

description: Preserve !prof metadata when frexp of select is folded to select of frexp. No corresponding entry for this test in profcheck-xfail.txt.

comments.body: Not planning on merging this patch after realizing that vector conditions aren't supported by FDO today so selects that use them will never see profdata.
